1→package com.fsck.k9.view
 2→
 3→import com.fsck.k9.mail.Address
 4→import org.apache.james.mime4j.util.CharsetUtil
 5→
 6→/**
 7→ * Used to parse name & email address pairs entered by the user.
 8→ *
 9→ * TODO: Build a custom implementation that can deal with typical inputs from users who are not familiar with the
10→ *  RFC 5322 address-list syntax. See (ignored) tests in `UserInputEmailAddressParserTest`.
11→ */
12→internal class UserInputEmailAddressParser {
13→
14→    @Throws(NonAsciiEmailAddressException::class)
15→    fun parse(input: String): List<Address> {
16→        return Address.parseUnencoded(input)
17→            .mapNotNull { address ->
18→                when {
19→                    address.isIncomplete() -> null
20→                    address.isNonAsciiAddress() -> throw NonAsciiEmailAddressException(address.address)
21→                    else -> Address.parse(address.toEncodedString()).firstOrNull()
22→                }
23→            }
24→    }
25→
26→    private fun Address.isIncomplete() = hostname.isNullOrBlank()
27→
28→    private fun Address.isNonAsciiAddress() = !CharsetUtil.isASCII(address)
29→}
30→
31→internal class NonAsciiEmailAddressException(message: String) : Exception(message)
32→

1→package com.fsck.k9
 2→
 3→import java.util.regex.Pattern
 4→
 5→class EmailAddressValidator {
 6→
 7→    fun isValidAddressOnly(text: CharSequence): Boolean = EMAIL_ADDRESS_PATTERN.matcher(text).matches()
 8→
 9→    companion object {
10→
11→        // https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc2396.txt (3.2.2)
12→        // https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc5321.txt (4.1.2)
13→
14→        private const val ALPHA = "[a-zA-Z]"
15→        private const val ALPHANUM = "[a-zA-Z0-9]"
16→        private const val ATEXT = "[0-9a-zA-Z!#$%&'*+\\-/=?^_`{|}~]"
17→        private const val QCONTENT = "([\\p{Graph}\\p{Blank}&&[^\"\\\\]]|\\\\[\\p{Graph}\\p{Blank}])"
18→        private const val TOP_LABEL = "(($ALPHA($ALPHANUM|\\-|_)*$ALPHANUM)|$ALPHA)"
19→        private const val DOMAIN_LABEL = "(($ALPHANUM($ALPHANUM|\\-|_)*$ALPHANUM)|$ALPHANUM)"
20→        private const val HOST_NAME = "((($DOMAIN_LABEL\\.)+$TOP_LABEL)|$DOMAIN_LABEL)"
21→
22→        private val EMAIL_ADDRESS_PATTERN = Pattern.compile(
23→            "^($ATEXT+(\\.$ATEXT+)*|\"$QCONTENT+\")" +
24→                "\\@$HOST_NAME",
25→        )
26→    }
27→}

 3→import com.fsck.k9.mail.Address
 4→import org.apache.james.mime4j.util.CharsetUtil
 5→
 6→/**
 7→ * Used to parse name & email address pairs entered by the user.
 8→ *
 9→ * TODO: Build a custom implementation that can deal with typical inputs from users who are not familiar with the
10→ *  RFC 5322 address-list syntax. See (ignored) tests in `UserInputEmailAddressParserTest`.
11→ */
12→internal class UserInputEmailAddressParser {
13→
14→    @Throws(NonAsciiEmailAddressException::class)
15→    fun parse(input: String): List<Address> {
16→        return Address.parseUnencoded(input)
17→            .mapNotNull { address ->
18→                when {
19→                    address.isIncomplete() -> null
20→                    address.isNonAsciiAddress() -> throw NonAsciiEmailAddressException(address.address)
21→                    else -> Address.parse(address.toEncodedString()).firstOrNull()
22→                }
23→            }
24→    }
25→
26→    private fun Address.isIncomplete() = hostname.isNullOrBlank()
27→
28→    private fun Address.isNonAsciiAddress() = !CharsetUtil.isASCII(address)
29→}
30→
31→internal class NonAsciiEmailAddressException(message: String) : Exception(message)
32→

1→package com.fsck.k9
 2→
 3→import java.util.regex.Pattern
 4→
 5→class EmailAddressValidator {
 6→
 7→    fun isValidAddressOnly(text: CharSequence): Boolean = EMAIL_ADDRESS_PATTERN.matcher(text).matches()
 8→
 9→    companion object {
10→
11→        // https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc2396.txt (3.2.2)
12→        // https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc5321.txt (4.1.2)
13→
14→        private const val ALPHA = "[a-zA-Z]"
15→        private const val ALPHANUM = "[a-zA-Z0-9]"
16→        private const val ATEXT = "[0-9a-zA-Z!#$%&'*+\\-/=?^_`{|}~]"
17→        private const val QCONTENT = "([\\p{Graph}\\p{Blank}&&[^\"\\\\]]|\\\\[\\p{Graph}\\p{Blank}])"
18→        private const val TOP_LABEL = "(($ALPHA($ALPHANUM|\\-|_)*$ALPHANUM)|$ALPHA)"
19→        private const val DOMAIN_LABEL = "(($ALPHANUM($ALPHANUM|\\-|_)*$ALPHANUM)|$ALPHANUM)"
20→        private const val HOST_NAME = "((($DOMAIN_LABEL\\.)+$TOP_LABEL)|$DOMAIN_LABEL)"
21→
22→        private val EMAIL_ADDRESS_PATTERN = Pattern.compile(
23→            "^($ATEXT+(\\.$ATEXT+)*|\"$QCONTENT+\")" +
24→                "\\@$HOST_NAME",
25→        )
26→    }
27→}
